# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  - name: backup-storage-bucket
    type: gcp-types/storage-v1:bucket
    properties:
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD
      lifecycle:
        rule:
          - action:
              type: Delete
            condition:
              age: 365
      versioning:
        enabled: false
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
      retentionPolicy:
        retentionPeriod: 0
      cors:
        - origin: ["*"]
          responseHeader: ["*"]
          method: ["GET", "HEAD", "PUT", "POST", "DELETE"]
          maxAge: 3600
      logging:
        logBucket: "gs://your-log-bucket"
        logObjectPrefix: "backup-logs/"
      encryption:
        defaultKmsKeyName: "projects/your-project-id/locations/global/keyRings/your-key-ring/cryptoKeys/your-key"
